evals.name: vault-ops-note-update
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Give the exact Obsidian CLI commands to read a note, append a task, and keep the file from opening.
evals.expected_output: Selects vault-ops and provides concrete obsidian commands.

evals.name: plugin-debug-loop
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Outline the smallest command loop to reload the plugin, check runtime errors, and capture evidence.
evals.expected_output: Selects plugin-debug and uses reload plus debug commands.

evals.name: dom-inspect-theme
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Recommend the exact command to inspect the workspace leaf text and one CSS value for the target selector.
evals.expected_output: Selects dom-inspect and uses DOM or CSS inspection commands.

evals.name: property-task-management
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: <playbook or decision>`. Give the exact commands to update a note status property and append a daily task.
evals.expected_output: Selects property-task-management and uses property or daily-note commands.

evals.name: choose-surface-bases
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: choose-obsidian-surface`. This is a routing-only decision. Do not create the `.base` file. Use the router id in the `Selected:` line, not the downstream skill name. Decide which surface should own this request: "Create a `.base` file with filters, formulas, and a card view for reading notes." After the `Selected:` line, add one short sentence naming the downstream surface and why `.base` authoring changes the choice.
evals.expected_output: Selects the choose-obsidian-surface guide and routes to obsidian-bases.

evals.name: handoff-pdf-reader
evals.prompt: Start with `Selected: handoff-to-pdf-reader`. This is a routing-only decision. Use the router id in the `Selected:` line, not the downstream skill name. Do not attempt to open a real PDF file. Decide the right surface for this request: "Extract the tables from an attached PDF, OCR the scanned pages, and summarize by page." After the `Selected:` line, add one short sentence that mentions OCR, page extraction, or structured JSON output.
evals.expected_output: Selects the handoff-to-pdf-reader guide and delegates to pdf-reader.
